title: DTO
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from DTO, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: Housing affordability package set to advance in Congress amid home-cost concerns
items.description: Wide-ranging legislation would reduce regulations for homebuilders while giving local governments incentives to streamline the building process.

items.title: Why SpaceX is putting a ‘self-growing’ city on the moon over Musk’s Mars dreams
Federal judge orders Fulton County Georgia election case documents unsealed by Tuesday
items.description: The FBI last month raided an election facility central to President Donald Trump's debunked claims of fraud in the 2020 election.

items.title: Tulsi Gabbard to testify at Senate Intelligence Committee amid election probe concerns
items.description: Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard has said she was at a Georgia election center during an FBI raid at the direction of President Trump.

items.title: Nasdaq up sharply into final hour, S&P 500 and Dow also climbing — follow live
